question.text: When is the VaR margin collected from the member released?

answer.text: Along with the pay-in, including early pay-in of securities
At end of the trading day
Only after the full settlement cycle is complete

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The VaR margin collected is released along with the pay-in, including early pay-in of securities. **The Trap:** It is not held until the entire settlement cycle is complete; it is released at pay-in stage. **Cross-Exam Context:** Margin release timing impacts capital efficiency for brokers. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Early pay-in of securities can help release margins sooner, improving capital utilization.
